image:image.image:title: DJ Juan mixing portrait
image:image.image:caption: DJ Juan mixing with headphones in warm editorial event lighting.

image:image.image:title: DJ Juan formal event portrait
image:image.image:caption: DJ Juan behind a professional controller at a formal indoor event.

image:image.image:title: DJ Juan stage performance
image:image.image:caption: DJ Juan performing on stage in warm event lighting.

image:image.image:title: Formal event DJ setup
image:image.image:caption: Formal indoor event room with DJ setup and guests.

image:image.image:title: Dinner room DJ setup
image:image.image:caption: Dinner event room from behind the DJ setup with lighting and guests seated.

image:image.image:title: Cocktail hour and ceremony DJ support
image:image.image:caption: DJ setup with live string musicians during cocktail hour or ceremony support.

image:image.image:title: Daytime event DJ setup
image:image.image:caption: Daytime event room from behind the DJ controller with speakers and guests.

image:image.image:title: Dance floor from DJ point of view
image:image.image:caption: Dance floor from the DJ point of view with guests and DJ equipment.

image:image.image:title: Retrato de DJ Juan mezclando
image:image.image:caption: DJ Juan mezclando con audífonos y luz editorial cálida de evento.

image:image.image:title: Retrato formal de DJ Juan en evento
image:image.image:caption: DJ Juan detrás de un controlador profesional en un evento formal interior.

image:image.image:title: Setup de DJ para cena
image:image.image:caption: Salón de cena visto desde el setup de DJ con iluminación e invitados.

image:image.image:title: Pista de baile desde el punto de vista del DJ
image:image.image:caption: Pista de baile vista desde el DJ con invitados y equipo.
